src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Widen exception handling to catch all Throwables to prevent startup crashes from non-IOException errors.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: Runtime failure: if initGse or initEndpoints throws a non-IOException (e.g., RuntimeException, Error), the original code would let it propagate uncaught, potentially crashing the application context initialization.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Add import for Jetty's QueuedThreadPool to support custom thread pool configuration.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: Compile error: the class references QueuedThreadPool but lacks the import statement.
